title: LJY 100 Pieces White Lace Rectangle Paper Doilies Cake Packaging Pads Wedding Tableware Decoration (10.5 x 14.5 inch)
features: Material: lace paper doilies are made from raw wood pulp, non-toxic and tasteless, thin but solid.
Special design: these paper doilies have an antique lace design in white color, cute and delicate, elegant addition to tables, turn occasions into a special celebration.
Great for birthdays, parties, weddings tray, plate, platter, table decorating, etc. Note: If customers receive defective item on arrival, please kindly contact seller for free replacement.

Wide Applications: cake mats, food pad, place on trays, under juice glasses, under butter, under flower vases, wrapping small gifts, wrap wedding invitations, card making, craft projects and scrapbook projects etc.
description: Product Description Elegant Paper Doilies for Every Occasion Our white lace - paper doilies come in multiple sizes. Perfect for a touch of British charm in your dining or decor. Elevate your table with these delicate doilies. Elevate Your Party with Paper Doilies! Transform your party table into a charming British - style haven. Our white paper doilies, also known as lace doilies or doilies lace paper, add an elegant touch to any event. Perfect for that special celebration! Elevate Your Desserts with Paper Doilies Perfect for British - style desserts! Our lace paper doilies add an elegant touch to cakes and pastries. Ideal for a refined dessert scene. Elegant Paper Doilies for Handmade Cards Add a touch of delicate lace-like charm to your card-making with our white paper doilies. Perfect for creating timeless, refined designs. Elegant Doily - Wrapped Gifts Elevate your gift - giving with our delicate lace doilies on white paper. Perfect for any occasion, adding a touch of sophistication to your packaging. Ideal for those who appreciate refined details. If you’d like alternatives, we’ve curated more choices just a click away.
